_comment: BCOS schedule configuration. To change anything here, ask Claude: 'run audit twice a week', 'turn off architecture review', 'switch to weekdays-only index'. Claude will use the schedule-tune skill to edit this file safely. Manual editing works too but is not recommended.

dispatcher._comment: Informational only — the actual cron is on the scheduled task itself (bcos-{PROJECT}). If you change the cron, update this hint too so docs stay in sync.

index-health._about: Rebuild document index + scan for frontmatter, metadata, and cross-reference issues. Cheap — always run daily.

daydream-lessons._about: Strategic reflection + lessons capture. Once a week is usually enough.

daydream-deep._about: Deeper mid-week daydream — gaps, structural change. Skip in new projects where context is still forming.

audit-inbox._about: Deep CLEAR audit + inbox processing. Weekly by default; bump to twice-weekly if the inbox grows faster than you can triage.

architecture-review._about: Monthly full architecture + ecosystem pass. Quarterly is fine once context is mature — just change 'schedule' to a cron like '0 0 1 */3 *' or ask Claude to do it.

wiki-stale-propagation._about: Scan wiki pages whose builds-on sources changed after last-reviewed. Cheap metadata-only check; emits action items for human review.

wiki-source-refresh._about: Two-tier source-summary refresh: HEAD-only quick checks at stale_threshold_days/4, full refresh-must-rediscover at stale_threshold_days.

wiki-graveyard._about: Monthly archive-candidate scan for stale/orphaned/expired wiki pages. Suggests archive actions; only whitelisted post-mortem expiry is auto-fixable.

wiki-coverage-audit._about: Quarterly cross-zone coverage scan. Surfaces active data points without wiki explainers and wiki clusters not present in document-index as INFO.

auto-fix-audit._about: Friday weekly safety brake on the self-learning ladder. Surfaces amber cards when a learned rule reversal rate crosses 5% in 7 days. Recommend-only at v0.1.

lifecycle-sweep._about: Friday weekly classifier of active-zone docs against lifecycle-routing.yml. Surface-only for the first 2 weeks (default); flip lifecycle-routing.yml > global.surface_only=false after 0 false-positives confirmed to enable auto-routing.

auto_fix._about: Fixes the dispatcher is allowed to apply without asking. Anything NOT on this list becomes an action item instead. See references/auto-fix-whitelist.md for exact semantics of each ID.

digest._about: Overwrites each run. Full history lives in .claude/hook_state/schedule-diary.jsonl. Set auto_commit: true to commit generated artifacts (digest, index, diary, wake-up context) at the end of each run — but ONLY if the working tree has no other changes. Never pushes, never branches. Safe default is false; flip to true once you trust a week of clean runs.
digest._about_block_on_red: When true (default), auto_commit is skipped on red verdict runs even if the tree is otherwise clean. Surfaces an Auto-commit paused chip in the cockpit. Set to false to opt back into committing on red days.

tuning._about: Adaptive tuning is suggestion-only. The dispatcher never changes this config on its own.
